content.label: Secant-cubed reduction via parts
content.applies_when: write sec^3 x = sec x * sec^2 x and use integration by parts; the integral reappears and is solved algebraically

content.label: Integration by parts
content.symbolic: integral u dv = u*v - integral v du

content.label: Integral of secant
content.symbolic: integral sec x dx = ln|sec x + tan x| + C

content.concept: u = sec x, dv = sec^2 x dx
content.meaning: u = sec x (du = sec x tan x dx) and dv = sec^2 x dx (v = tan x)

content.label: Solve algebraically for the recurring integral I
content.applies_when: using tan^2 x = sec^2 x - 1 the integral reproduces itself: I = sec x tan x - I + ln|sec x + tan x|
content.transformation: collect: 2I = sec x tan x + ln|sec x + tan x|, so I = (1/2)(sec x tan x + ln|sec x + tan x|) + C

content.label: Apply parts to sec^3 x
content.action: let I = integral sec^3 x dx; parts gives I = sec x tan x - integral sec x tan^2 x dx
content.purpose: expose a tan^2 x term that can be rewritten with an identity

content.label: Use tan^2 x = sec^2 x - 1
content.action: substitute tan^2 x = sec^2 x - 1 to get I = sec x tan x - I + ln|sec x + tan x|
content.purpose: reproduce I and introduce the known integral of sec x

content.label: Solve for I
content.action: solve 2I = sec x tan x + ln|sec x + tan x| for I
content.purpose: isolate I to finish the reduction
